predicates.name: is_surviving_legal_cohabitant_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legal cohabitant of the second person.

predicates.name: is_descendant_of
predicates.description: The first person is a descendant of the second person.

predicates.name: preceding_provisions_do_not_apply
predicates.description: The preceding provisions do not apply to the first person with respect to the second person.
